description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: The ID of the CVE, for example: CVE-2022-1653 CVE.CVSS2 The CVSS2 temporal score of the CVE based on exploitability, remediation level & report confidence, for example: 10.0
outputs.name: CVE.ID

outputs.description: The CVSS3 temporal score of the CVE based on exploitability, remediation level & report confidence, for example: 10.0 CVE.Published The timestamp of when the CVE was published.
outputs.name: CVE.CVSS3

outputs.description: The timestamp of when the CVE was last modified. CVE.Description A description of the CVE.
outputs.name: CVE.Modified

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested. DBotScore.Reliability Reliability of the source providing the intelligence data.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor that was used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type
